_comment: A library module in the real schema from spectrumefficiencylimited/power-bi-template (modules/). This is the ER KPI strip — the same five healthcare KPIs the engine generates from config/examples/hospital_er.yaml, with the patient-count contract (DISTINCTCOUNT) and the brand colour baked in. The repo is the source of truth; this mirrors its shape.

module.name: ED KPI Strip
module.description: Top-line ED operating metrics. Drop on any dashboard for a consistent, governed header row.
module.author: Insights and Analytics Unit

cards.contract: patient_count_distinct (error) — must be DISTINCTCOUNT, never COUNT/COUNTROWS
no_hardcoded_sla (warning) — 30-min threshold + 85% target come from parameters, not the visual
